description: Mi Argentina (gov OIDC) as drop-in tools for the Vercel AI SDK. PKCE login, ID-token JWT verification with JWKS caching, userinfo, refresh.

tools.name: mi_argentina_start_login
tools.description: Start an OIDC login flow against Mi Argentina. Returns the authorize URL + state/nonce for replay protection.

tools.name: mi_argentina_complete_login
tools.description: Exchange the OIDC code for an ID token + access token. Verifies the JWT signature against the cached JWKS.

tools.name: mi_argentina_get_user_profile
tools.description: Fetch the authenticated user's profile (DNI, name, contact info) from the Mi Argentina userinfo endpoint.

tools.name: mi_argentina_verify_id_token
tools.description: Verify an ID token JWT against Mi Argentina's published JWKS. Use to validate identity claims from upstream services.

tools.name: mi_argentina_refresh_token
tools.description: Refresh an expired access token using a refresh token. Maintains long-lived sessions without forcing re-login.
